name: Critical Satellite Alert Response
description: Automated response for critical satellite alerts. Changes alert status, notifies operators, creates an incident, dispatches webhook, waits 30 minutes, then escalates to admins if unacknowledged, and drafts a NIS2 early warning report.

config.message: A critical satellite alert has been triggered. Immediate investigation required.
ESCALATION: Critical satellite alert was not acknowledged within 30 minutes. Admin attention required.

name: Ground Station Security Event
description: Response procedure for ground station security events. Notifies SOC, adds triage guidance, requests human approval before escalating to a full incident.

config.message: Ground station security event detected. SOC triage required.

config.noteTemplate:
Ground station security event triage checklist:
1. Verify physical access logs for anomalies
2. Check network perimeter alerts
3. Review RF interference indicators
4. Assess impact on active satellite passes
5. Document initial findings

name: NIS2 Deadline Approaching
description: Automated reminder workflow for NIS2 reporting deadlines. Sends notifications, waits for report generation, then escalates if no action is taken.

config.message: NIS2 reporting deadline is approaching. Please generate and submit the required report within 4 hours.
DEADLINE ESCALATION: NIS2 report has not been generated within the 4-hour window. Admin intervention required.

config.noteTemplate: NIS2 deadline reminder sent. Awaiting report generation and submission.
